text: Bapu ke guzarne ke baad gaon ki zameen ko lekar Tauji se sibling estrangement ho gayi hai, aur ab unhone permanently mere metro wale flat mein rehne ka announce kar diya hai. Main yahan akele isolation mein struggle kar raha hoon aur meri privacy khatam ho jayegi, par Bapu ke samman mein main unhe mana nahi kar sakta kyunki bade-buzurgo ke khilaf bolna 'izzat' ke khilaf hai. Main bas mann maar kar unke aage sir jhuka raha hoon taaki parivaar mein aur fracture na aaye.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi ghar mitti mein mil gaya hai aur ab Mummy keh rahi hain ki in-laws ke aane se hi hamara remittance ka bojh kam hoga. Language gap aur metro lifestyle mein main pehle hi ghabraya rehta hoon, par Papa ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye main in-laws ko jane ko nahi bol sakta. Main bas sabki khatir-daari kar raha hoon taaki rishtedar ye na kahein ki shehar jaakar main sanskar bhool gaya hoon.

Ghar mein jaydad ko lekar bhai-bhai mein darar aa chuki hai, aur ab in-laws ke permanent aane se mere chote se kamre mein rehna mushkil ho gaya hai. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivaar ki shanti ke liye main chup-chap unki baatein sunta hoon kyunki hamare yahan बड़ों ke aage bolna bad-tameezi mani jati hai. Main apni takleef kisi ko nahi bata raha taaki ghar ki baat bazaar mein na uchle aur 'log kya kahenge' wala darr na bane.

Dadi ke marne ke baad property ka jhagda itna badha ki ab Mummy ne sulah ke liye apne bhai ko permanently mere paas bhej diya hai. Mujh par gaon paise bhejne ka pehle hi bojh hai par main unhe jaane ko nahi bol sakta kyunki rishto ka lihaz rakhna meri primary duty hai. Main bas mann hi mann ghut raha hoon par bahar se sabki seva kar raha hoon taaki parivaar ki unity aur Papa ka naam bana rahe.

Urban migrant hone ke naate main pehle hi isolated hoon, aur ab property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere liye ek naya stress hai. Main khul kar bolna chahta hoon ki main inka kharcha nahi utha sakta, par 'izzat' aur parivaar ke darr se main hamesha defensive rehta hoon. Pati aur bete hone ka farz nibhate huye main unke samman mein apni har khwahish kurban kar raha hoon taaki rishtey bache rahein.
